repos.readmeSummary: This repository implements Geometric Neural Operators (GNPs) for machine learning tasks on 3D point cloud data, including curvature estimation, shape deformations, and solving geometric partial differential equations. It provides pretrained transferable models for researchers and practitioners working with geometric deep learning and computational geometry.

parentStats.description: Geometric Neural Operators (GNPs) for machine learning tasks on point-cloud representations: curvature estimation, shape deformations, solvers for geometric PDEs.  Also, includes weights of pretrained transferable GNP models.

repos.name: SnapRHI
repos.description: A lightweight, modern Render Hardware Interface (RHI) abstraction layer for C++ SnapRHI provides a clean, unified API that abstracts away the complexity of modern graphics APIs — enabling you to write rendering code once and target multiple backends seamlessly.
repos.readmeSummary: SnapRHI is a C++ graphics rendering abstraction layer that provides a unified API for multiple graphics backends like Vulkan, DirectX, and OpenGL. It allows developers to write rendering code once and deploy it across different graphics APIs without rewriting platform-specific code. The library is primarily used by game developers and graphics programmers who need cross-platform rendering capabilities.

parentStats.description: A lightweight, modern Render Hardware Interface (RHI) abstraction layer for C++ SnapRHI provides a clean, unified API that abstracts away the complexity of modern graphics APIs — enabling you to write rendering code once and target multiple backends seamlessly.

repos.name: reporium
